title: polygala schoenlankii var. schoenlankii
intro: Polygala schoenlankii var. schoenlankii is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family, Polygalaceae. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, improve respiratory health, and support the cardiovascular system. Herbal preparations of Polygala schoenlankii var. schoenlankii are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
